$comment: Ch 3 — THE FADE, scenario 1 (stationary control case). Authored from SCENARIO_SPECS_v1.md + SCENARIO_VOICE_v1.md (locked 2026-05-21). Schema mirrors bb-1-baseline.json. Establishes the reference release the next two fade scenarios will perturb. The fade is represented by increasing the effective distance (engine has no body-momentum model).

meta.title: FEET PLANTED.
meta.subtitle: CH 3 — THE FADE, CONTROL CASE
meta.authorIntent: Control case for the fade chapter. d=5.0, h_r=2.3, h_h=3.05. Textbook answer θ=55°, v=7.63 m/s. Verification: t = 5.0 / (7.63·cos 55°) = 1.142 s; y(1.142) = 2.3 + 7.63·sin(55°)·1.142 − ½·9.8·1.142² = 3.046 m — matches h_h (err 0.004 m). Pedagogical purpose: establish the d=5.0/h_r=2.3 reference that the fade scenarios perturb. Body is stationary; the release does all the work.

situation.questionRevealed: Find an angle θ and velocity v that lands the ball through the hoop.

subheadVariants.1: Came up short. The arms had to do all of it.
subheadVariants.3+: Short again. Power well below threshold.

subheadVariants.1: Front iron. The release was short of the lip.
subheadVariants.2: Still front iron. Lift the arc.
subheadVariants.3+: Front iron again. Push the angle higher.

subheadVariants.1: Back iron. Too much pace for a still body.
subheadVariants.2: Still back iron. Cut the velocity.

subheadVariants.3+: Far overshoot. Power well above threshold.

subheadVariants.1: Air ball. No body to blame — the line drifted.
subheadVariants.2: Air ball again. Aim for the rim.
subheadVariants.3+: Still air ball. Check angle and velocity.

ghostArc.description: Textbook answer θ=55°, v=7.63 m/s. Clean stationary midrange — the reference shape the next two fade scenarios pull away from.

hints.body: Standing still — pure projectile motion. Solve for angle and velocity.

Two equations, two unknowns:
  x(t) = v·cos(θ)·t
  y(t) = h_r + v·sin(θ)·t − ½·g·t²
Ball at the rim when x = d, y = h_h.
Substitute t = d/(v·cos θ) into y. Try θ near 55° and solve for v.

workedSteps: Solve y(t) = h_h for v → v ≈ 7.63 m/s.

intro.headline: FEET PLANTED.
intro.subhead: Stationary release. The body adds nothing to the ball.

subheadByFlavor.SWISH: No drift. The release does all the work.
subheadByFlavor.RIM_DROP: Sat on the iron and dropped.

miss.headline: MISSED.

diagnosticByCategory.SHORT: Came up short. The arms had to do all of it.
diagnosticByCategory.AIRBALL: Air ball. No body to blame — the line drifted.

bracketHintByCategory.FRONT_RIM: Geometry: θ near 55°, push v near 7.6.
bracketHintByCategory.BACK_RIM: Geometry: θ near 55°, cut v by ~0.4.
bracketHintByCategory.SHORT: Geometry: θ near 55°, push v near 7.6.
bracketHintByCategory.OVERSHOOT: Geometry: θ near 55°, cut v by ~0.8.

miss.afterAllHintsCopy: All hints revealed. The math is on the table.
